name: karpathy-skills
description: Claude Code tooling derived from Andrej Karpathy's publicly stated observations on working with LLM coding agents.

plugins.name: karpathy
plugins.description: Operationalizes Andrej Karpathy's four LLM-coding principles. /karpathy:audit reviews a CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md instruction file for principle coverage and file quality; /karpathy:diff reviews an in-progress code change before you commit it — catching scope creep, drive-by refactors, unexplained deletions, over-engineering, and missing verification. Includes an advisory update checker for Claude Code and Codex installs.
